headline: Fertilizer Supply Jitters and Softer EPS Outlook Might Change The Case For Investing In Mosaic (MOS)
summary: The Mosaic Company recently prepared to release its Q1 2026 earnings, with analysts expecting a year-on-year EPS decline while investors reacted to concerns that a potential U.S. blockade could disrupt global fertilizer supply chains. This tension between anticipated earnings pressure and renewed attention on supply risks in fertilizers has sharpened focus on Mosaic’s exposure to global trade flows and agricultural input security. We’ll now examine how rising concern over fertilizer supply...
